revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} 
}}{{{1}}} (age {{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}<{{{2}}}
  |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}
  |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}>{{{2}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
}})<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#ifexpr: ( {{{1}}} > {{CURRENTYEAR}} ) OR ( {{CURRENTYEAR}} - {{{1}}} > 150 ) |  {{Error|invalid year}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using age template with invalid date]]}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifexpr: ( {{{2}}} > 12 ) OR ( {{{2}}} < 1 ) |  {{Error|invalid month}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using age template with invalid date]]}}|}}
}}<!--
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using birth year and age template with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth year and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} | 0
| {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}
  | {{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P31}},|Q5,|1|1|true|}}
    | {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P569}}
      |
      | [[Category:Date of birth not in Wikidata]]
      }}
    }}
  | [[Category:Articles without Wikidata item]]
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} 
}}{{{1}}} (age {{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}<{{{2}}}
  |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}
  |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}>{{{2}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
}})<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#ifexpr: ( {{{1}}} > {{CURRENTYEAR}} ) OR ( {{CURRENTYEAR}} - {{{1}}} > 150 ) |  {{Error|invalid year}}{{Main other|}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifexpr: ( {{{2}}} > 12 ) OR ( {{{2}}} < 1 ) |  {{Error|invalid month}}{{Main other|}}|}}
}}<!--
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth year and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} | 0
| {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}
  | {{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P31}},|Q5,|1|1|true|}}
    | {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P569}}
      |
      |       }}
    }}
  |   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Birth_year_and_age here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Birth_year_and_age for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} 
}}{{{1}}} (age {{#if:{{{2|}}}
 |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}<{{{2}}}
  |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}
  |{{#ifexpr:{{CURRENTMONTH}}>{{{2}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
   |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
  }}
 }}
 |{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}-1}}–{{#expr:{{CURRENTYEAR}}-{{{1}}}}}
}})<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#ifexpr: ( {{{1}}} > {{CURRENTYEAR}} ) OR ( {{CURRENTYEAR}} - {{{1}}} > 150 ) |  {{Error|invalid year}}{{Main other|}}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifexpr: ( {{{2}}} > 12 ) OR ( {{{2}}} < 1 ) |  {{Error|invalid month}}{{Main other|}}|}}
}}<!--
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Birth year and age]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}} | 0
| {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|label|raw}}
  | {{#if: {{#invoke:String|match|{{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P31}},|Q5,|1|1|true|}}
    | {{#if: {{#invoke:wd|properties|raw|P569}}
      |
      |       }}
    }}
  |   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
